Metadata.title: Axia Meetings
Metadata.description: Axia Meetings is a meeting management tool that helps you to organize and manage your meetings.

hero.title:
Decisions

Accelerated.
hero.subtitle: The ultimate governance platform for modern boards. Real-time AI summaries, legally binding digital voting, and automated high-fidelity minutes—all in one secure ecosystem.

item1.title: AI-Driven Intelligence
item1.desc: Leverage Gemini & Groq for instant high-fidelity minutes.

item2.title: Legally Binding Votes
item2.desc: Cryptographically secured voting with real-time results.

item3.title: Global Collaboration
item3.desc: Seamless translation in English, French, and Arabic.

features.title:
State-of-the-Art

Governance Tech.
features.subtitle: Harnessing Gemini & Groq to eliminate administrative overhead.

item1.title: AI-Generated Minutes
item1.desc: Our AI analyzes the entire session to generate professional, high-fidelity PVs and executive summaries instantly.

item2.title: Real-time Digital Voting
item2.desc: Secure, cryptographically verified voting with instant quorum calculation and live results visualization.

item3.title: Global Mobility
item3.desc: Native apps and web access with real-time translation in English, French, and Arabic for international collaboration.

item4.title: 98% Engagement Rate
item4.desc: Automated reminders and seamless one-click joining links ensure maximum participant turnout.

process.testimonial: Axia's AI summaries are frighteningly accurate. It has completely removed the burden of manual note-taking from our board meetings.
process.title:
Intelligent.

Automated. Absolute.
process.subtitle: Transforming the chaos of traditional meetings into a structured, digital-first workflow.

step1.title: Intelligent Onboarding
step1.desc: Sync your organization's data via secure APIs or use our AI to import participant lists from any source.

step2.title: Interactive Live Sessions
step2.desc: Host high-definition hybrid sessions with live voting, hand-raising, and real-time AI agenda suggestions.

step3.title: Instant Governance
step3.desc: AI automatically polishes the meeting record, generates the PV in Word/PDF, and distributes it to all stakeholders.

pricing.title:
Simple Pricing.

No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your organization's scale.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Axia.

items.a: Yes, our platform is built to meet European and International standards for digital governance, including eIDAS-compliant voting and cryptographic time-stamping.
No. Participants can join with a secure one-click link sent to their email. They only need a browser to participate and vote.

items.q: Can we use our own branding?
items.a: Absolutely. Our Professional and Enterprise plans allow for full white-labeling, including your logo, colors, and custom email templates.

items.q: What happens if someone loses connection?
items.a: Axia automatically syncs states. As soon as a participant reconnects, they are brought back to the current agenda point and voting status instantly.

cta.title:
Ready for

the Future?
cta.subtitle: Join the organizations already saving thousands of hours every year.

link.title: Account Linking
link.description: Associate your local account with an external company identity.

dev.selectionRequired: Please select a company and an administrator to view status.

info.howDesc: Linking allows Axia to use your company credentials to synchronize data (participants, authentication).
info.howTip: Your external credentials are never stored in plain text; they are used to obtain a secure access token.

status.action: Please provide your company credentials to activate services.

manage.title: Link Management
manage.description: Your account is currently synchronized. You can unlink at any time.
